findings.evidence: `rg` shows the file-level assumption at line 71, nearby `omit [DecidableEq n]` at lines 86, 185, 192, 271, 285, but the new lemmas at lines 150, 158, 198, and 208 lack it.
findings.fix: Add `omit [DecidableEq n] in` before these lemmas, matching `coefficientSymmetricPart_isSymm`, `coefficientSymmetricPart_apply`, and the boundedness helper; generalize any local helper signatures needed for the proofs.
findings.issue: `toQuadraticForm'_transpose`, `matrixBilinearForm_transpose_apply`, `toQuadraticForm'_coefficientSymmetricPart`, and `matrixBilinearForm_coefficientSymmetricPart_apply` inherit the file-level `[DecidableEq n]` even though their statements do not use equality on indices.

summary: The new symmetric-part API mostly sits at the existing PDE coefficient level, but several new algebraic lemmas inherit an unnecessary `DecidableEq n` assumption despite nearby declarations already avoiding it.
